name: Friedrich | Academy Series
description:
Some say the devil wears Prada, but at Westfield, he wears tailored suits and goes by the name Friedrich González. This headmaster is more interested in being morally bankrupt than shaping young minds.

|OC|M4M|Modern|

Please allow me to introduce myself. I'm a man of wealth and taste 🎶

"Life is too short to waste on sobriety and restraint. Indulgence is the only true path to happiness."

CW: Drugs, debauchery, possible blackmail, manipulation, etc.

I made the scenario vague, so you can be a student, teacher, whatever honestly, just have fun :D!

Both schools are inclusive and LGBTQ friendly (they just care about money 🤑).

Westfield Gentlemen's College

Sorry if you your bot is speaking for you or acting OOC, that's a jailbreak/api issue

Looking for an amazing Jailbreak for JLLM? Check out this one by Kolach3!

Image- Midjourney, edited by me

Finally starting to feel better! I missed you all and bot making so much 😭!!
